2605.25962.title: Continual Speaker Identity Unlearning with Minimal Interference
2605.25962.paper_summary: Machine unlearning removes designated concepts or knowledge from pre-trained models. Recent work has extended this paradigm to speaker identity unlearning in zero-shot text-to-speech (ZS-TTS), the task of selectively erasing a model's ability to replicate a speaker's voice. Existing methods, however, quietly assume all unlearning requests arrive at once; an unrealistic assumption, since privacy-motivated removals arrive sequentially over time. We show this assumption breaks state-of-the-art methods: unlearning each new speaker fully revives previously unlearned speakers, reintroducing the very privacy risk unlearning was meant to eliminate. We present Cumulative ORThogonal Identity Suppression (CORTIS), the first framework for continual speaker identity unlearning in ZS-TTS that requires no access to previously-unlearned speaker data. CORTIS combines Fisher-information-based parameter masking, which localizes updates to speaker-relevant weights, with orthogonal projection against subspaces spanned by prior unlearning updates. With VoiceBox, CORTIS unlearns each requested speaker while keeping previously unlearned speakers forgotten across long request sequences, substantially outperforming sequential application of prior methods. The demo is available at https://cumulativeortis.github.io/ .
2605.25962.paper_summary_zh: 機器忘記從預訓練模型中移除指定的概念或知識。最近的研究將這一範疇擴展到了零樣本文本到語音（ZS-TTS）中的說話者身份忘記，這是一項選擇性地抹去模型複製說話者聲音能力的任務。然而，現有的方法默默假設所有的忘記請求同時到達；這是一個不切實際的假設，因為出於隱私考量的移除請求是隨時間逐步到達的。我們顯示這一假設會破壞最先進的方法：完全忘記每一位新說話者會重新喚醒之前忘記的說話者，重新引入忘記原本旨在消除的隱私風險。我們提出了累積正交身份抑制（CORTIS），這是第一個在ZS-TTS中進行持續說話者身份忘記的框架，並且不需要訪問之前未學習的說話者數據。CORTIS結合了基於Fisher信息的參數遮罩，將更新局限於與說話者相關的權重，並對先前忘記更新所跨越的子空間進行正交投影。通過VoiceBox，CORTIS在保持之前未學習的說話者在長請求序列中被遺忘的同時，忘記每一位請求的說話者，顯著超越了之前方法的序列應用。演示可在 https://cumulativeortis.github.io/ 獲得。
2605.25962.author: Jinju Kim et.al.
2605.25962.authors: Jinju Kim, Yunsung Kang, Gyeong-Moon Park, Jong Hwan Ko
